response.justification: Candidate is a solid senior/staff full-stack engineer with broad polyglot experience and some recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling, but the role calls for a Director-level individual contributor with ~15 years of experience and recognized AI expertise. The resume shows roughly 11-14 years of professional experience, no demonstrated AI products or platforms, no cloud/AI thought leadership, and no evidence of advising strategic customers or shaping cloud/AI strategy at the scale this Principal role requires.
strengths: Broad polyglot full-stack background across web, mobile, embedded and infrastructure
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators
Community engagement through workshops, talks and open-source projects (GISCollective)
concerns: No recognized AI expertise or shipped AI products/platforms at scale
Experience level and scope below Director/Principal IC bar (no strategy or executive advisory work)
Limited demonstrated cloud platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned, but no large-scale cloud architecture leadership)

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and shipped AI platforms
Seniority and scope below Principal/Director IC level
Emerging AI-agent and MCP tooling experience
